calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account, for Allowance of Compensation to Attorney for Ordinary Services and for Final Distirbution is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-20-2016 Continued To Jan-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-24-2016 Continued To Nov-07-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Murphy for (administrator) Betty Bluford.

The Court stated that we have some compliance but that there are still some outstanding issues and asked about securities for the 401(k). Mr. Murphy stated that they were sold. The Court asked about receipts for the cash disbursements. Mr. Murphy stated that there was only the Schwab check in the amount of $340,000.00 and that he has no additional receipts. The Court stated that it needs verification of the 2nd amended petition, proof of service on notice of the 2nd amended petition mailed to all interested parties or waivers, notice of the 3rd amendment was not on a Judicial Council form as required and that it will give counsel 1 week to get these items filed. The Court stated that the requested documents are to be filed no later that October 31, 2016, that the Accounting petition will be continued to November 7, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and may be taken under submission at that time.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-24-2016 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Continued To Oct-24-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that it is 10:05 a.m., that there is no appearance by Mr. Murphy and that the Court will issue an Order After Hearing setting forth compliance regarding filings. The Accounting petition was continued to October 24, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Aquino. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-08-2016 Continued To Sep-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Continued To Aug-08-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Continued To Jul-18-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John J. Murphy for petitioner Betty Bluford.

Mr. Murphy stated that he had made a supplemental filing in response to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Court responded that the supplemental submission did not address all the questions raised by the examiner or provide all the information requested. The Court stated that a more comprehensive response to the examiner's notes was needed. The matter was continued to July 18, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to provide time for an augmented response to the notes.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-02-2016 Continued To Jun-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-14-2016 Continued To May-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Murphy for Betty Bluford.

Mr. Murphy reported that he just received information from Schwab on the 401k plan, that he also received a letter from the Probate Referee suggesting that he contact an individual, that Mr. Murphy attempted to contact the individual on Saturday to no avail and that the matter will be resolved with the exception of the two issues where the information is not available. The Court stated that this is a problem, that the inventory & appraisal was due in August 2015, that there have been continuances and problems since then and asked how the court could be assured that this will be done in 30 days. Mr. Murphy stated that the probate referee (Kasolas) is referring him to a person in San Francisco who has the necessary information. The Court stated that the recommendation was to start imposing sanctions, that it does not want to do that and asked what is different this time. Mr. Murphy stated that he will contact Mr. Kasolas to get the contact information for the person mentioned. The Court stated that it will not impose sanctions today, but that if everything is not in by May 2, 2016 sanctions will run as of that date. The Court further stated that if by May 2, 2016 it does not have the inventory & appraisal, the information regarding the Schwab 401k and the information from the probate referee sanctions will start accruing at $50.00 per day as of that date. The accounting petition was continued to May 2, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos & Deputy Neves. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Continued To Mar-14-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Continued To Feb-08-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Continued To Jan-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Murphy for (Administrator) Betty Bluford. Sally Gratz for the San Francisco Public Administrator - checked in but was not present during the hearing.

Mr. Murphy reported that they have wrapped everything up, that they have prepared the final closing papers, that they have been submitted and that there are no objections. The Court asked about the Schwab 401(k) statement and if there was anything additional to file. Mr. Murphy stated that the 401(k) statement was submitted and that there are no non-cash deductions. The accounting petition was taken under submission. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Continued To Aug-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Attorney John Murphy called the court clerk to state that he is unable to attend the hearing due to illness. The accounting petition and the Order to Appear were continued to August 24, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel was told that if he is unable to appear on that date he should appoint other counsel to take over the case. In addition, the court will contact the Public Administrator to appear on August 24, 2015 to potentially accept an appointment.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Continued To Jul-20-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that there has been issues with lack of appearance on multiple occasions, that it will suspend the powers of the Administrator, Betty Bluford. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Betty Bluford and her Attorney John Murphy to appear on July 20, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the has not been a response to the examiner's notes. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Murphy for and with (administrator) Betty Bluford.

Mr. Murphy reported that there have been 5 recent deaths in Mr. Bluford's family and that they need a 3 week continuance. The accounting petition was continued to March 23, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Murillo. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Continued To Feb-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Murphy for the administrator.

Mr. Murphy requested a continuance due to medical issues, stated that he is having serious problems regarding communications with his client, that he may have to file a motion to be relieved as counsel and that he is unable to file a petition to distribute without his client assisting with information regarding how the $20,000.00 was spent. An Order to Appear will be issued to the administrator to appear on February 23, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The accounting is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Wan. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Continued To Jan-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Murphy for Betty Bluford.

Mr. Murphy requested a two week continuance stating that the Administrator promised to provide him with additional information by this week but it has not arrived. The accounting petition was continued to January 26, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
